activities.name: Tangled Classic with a few stops. Goal: 8:30 pace, no stops
activities.description: Done this run 31 times since I started running more than 6 years ago. I once did it at the 8 minute pace, but those days are gone I think. 8:30 is a goal to be achieved before I return to work on June 12th.
